hypotheses.text: Sk and Sm share convergent atrial co-expression modules absent in Rn
hypotheses.rationale: Atrium n=23 is borderline but testable; 7 Sk atrial samples provide minimal power

hypotheses.text: Sk and Sm share convergent ventricular co-expression modules absent in Rn
hypotheses.rationale: Ventricle n=48 is adequate for WGCNA; 16 Sk + 16 Sm ventricular samples

hypotheses.text: Whole-heart convergent signature exists without chamber separation
hypotheses.rationale: Too broad without chamber separation; all-sample WGCNA already showed species-specific modules

hypotheses.text: Shared modules are enriched for energy metabolism pathways
hypotheses.rationale: Requires GO/KEGG enrichment after module identification

hypotheses.text: Shared modules are enriched for calcium handling genes
hypotheses.rationale: Cardiac contraction depends on calcium cycling; high heart rate demands rapid calcium turnover

hypotheses.text: Shared modules are enriched for ECM/structural remodeling
hypotheses.rationale: Cardiac adaptation may involve structural remodeling of extracellular matrix

hypotheses.text: NULL: no convergent module exists between Sk and Sm
hypotheses.rationale: Falsification baseline; testable via module preservation Z < 2

key_uncertainty: All-sample WGCNA (round 1) found species-specific modules (turquoise=species, yellow=Sm, brown=Sk) but could not test chamber-specific convergence. Atrium n=23 (7 Sk) is borderline for WGCNA module stability.
